hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?|css)$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.test\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && npx vitest run "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -15; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|DELETE FROM.*WHERE 1|TRUNCATE)'; then echo 'BLOQUEADO: Comando destructivo detectado' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Tarea completada' --icon=dialog-information 2>/dev/null || osascript -e 'display notification "Tarea completada" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
